title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:35945:run:20260402T093242:53776 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: 理解した。リポジトリ内で「ライブ証跡（evidence）」を生成/更新できる主なコマンドは以下です（編集なし）。 **Codex 証跡** - 起動時の自動証跡: `scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh launch` - ブートストラップレシート書き込み、`record-provider codex success launch`、compact 更新を実施。 - 追加の任意証跡: `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh record-provider codex success|failure "..."` - 起動系での状態推移: `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh transition ...` / `scheduler-state ...` - 関連: [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh) **GLM 証跡** - 主要実行経路: `scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh ...` - 成功時は `record-provider glm success`、失敗時は `record-provider glm failure` を自動記録。 - 失敗耐性状態（追加証跡）: `scripts/lib/kernel-glm-run-state.sh status|fail|recover|reset` - 関連: [scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh), [scripts/lib/kernel-glm-run-state.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-glm-run-state.sh) **Specialist 証跡** - 直接実行での証跡: `scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh <provider> ...` - 成功/失敗で `record-provider <provider> success|failure` を更新。 - レーン準備・選定: `scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh ready|pick`（主に認証/利用可能性の証跡） - 対応 providers は picker で確認できる `gemini-cli/cursor-cli/copilot-cli/auto` 系。 - 関連: [scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh), [scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-specialist-picker.sh) **Receipt / Compact 証跡** - Receipt: - `scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write` - `scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh path|status` - Compact: - `scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh update <event> [summary]` - `scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh path|status` - 全体状態は ledger 経由で追跡されるので、`kernel-runtime-ledger.sh` も必須セット: - [scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh), [scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh), [scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-launch.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-launch.sh) 補足: `kernel-codex-thread.sh` は主にスレッド起動ユーティリティで、provider ledger への記録は自動実行側から行う構成。`codex-kernel-guard launch` が codex の正式なエビデンス投入入口。
